title: Glean
description: Self-hosted RSS reader and personal knowledge management tool with AI-powered semantic search over your saved reading.
installation: This template deploys the PRIMARY backend API only (ghcr.io/leslieleung/glean-backend, FastAPI, port 8000). Glean is a multi-container stack: also deploy the WORKER (same image ghcr.io/leslieleung/glean-backend run as the arq background task queue), the WEB frontend (ghcr.io/leslieleung/glean-web, listens on :80), and the ADMIN dashboard (ghcr.io/leslieleung/glean-admin, listens on :80, default ADMIN_PORT 3001). It also requires a MILVUS vector database (milvusdb/milvus:v2.6.6) plus its etcd (quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.5) and minio (minio/minio) dependencies for semantic search embeddings - Milvus is not an available operator add-on, so deploy it separately and point MILVUS_HOST/MILVUS_PORT at it (default 19530). Postgres and Redis (Valkey) are provisioned by the add-ons below. ROTATE before exposing: SECRET_KEY (JWT signing - replace with `openssl rand -hex 32`), the postgres password, and ADMIN_PASSWORD. First run: CREATE_ADMIN=true auto-creates the super_admin from ADMIN_USERNAME/ADMIN_PASSWORD; RUN_MIGRATIONS=true applies DB migrations on boot. Note: upstream still labels this project as in-development / not production-ready.
